query: SELECT s.name, COUNT(p.id) as total_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_active = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inactive_products FROM stores s LEFT JOIN products p ON p.store_id = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%apple%' OR s.name LIKE '%Apple%' GROUP BY s.id, s.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT s.name, COUNT(p.id) as total_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_active = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inactive_products FROM stores s LEFT JOIN products p ON p.store_id = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%apple%' OR s.name LIKE '%Apple%' GROUP BY s.id, s.name;
